name: motion-morphing-dialog
title: Morphing Dialog
author: Motion Primitives
description: Expands a trigger into a modal dialog with shared-layout motion.

changes: Changed local utility and click-outside imports from root aliases to ../../lib/utils and ../../hooks/useClickOutside.
Applied the caller transition through one MotionConfig and added an instant reduced-motion configuration.
Connected the internal trigger ref, removed duplicate native-button keyboard handling, fixed dialog label/description ids, and restored focus on close.
Scoped keyboard trapping to the open state, focused the dialog when it has no focusable child, and cleaned up the body scroll-lock class on close or unmount.
Applied the existing container className and style props that upstream declared but did not forward.

modifications.change: Changed local imports and made narrow reduced-motion, focus, semantic-id, and cleanup repairs without changing the compound component API.
modifications.reason: Resolve copied helpers, provide an instant reduced-motion path, and make the upstream modal behavior safe enough to stage for browser review.
